tool.name: save_session_profile
tool.description: Store a reusable authenticated or role-specific HTTP session profile so later authorization and differential tests can reference it by name instead of repeating headers, cookies, params, and base URLs.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Human-readable profile name such as "guest", "owner", "admin", or "tenant-b-user".

parameter.name: headers
parameter.description: HTTP headers to reuse, such as Authorization or X-CSRF-Token.

parameter.name: cookies
parameter.description: Cookie values to reuse for this session.

parameter.name: params
parameter.description: Default query parameters to attach for this session, if needed.

parameter.name: base_url
parameter.description: Optional absolute base URL. When set, validation tools can accept a path and resolve the full URL from this profile.

parameter.name: role
parameter.description: Role label such as guest, user, owner, manager, or admin.

parameter.name: tenant
parameter.description: Tenant or account label used to distinguish cross-tenant contexts.

parameter.name: notes
parameter.description: Optional notes about how the session was obtained or when it should be used.

tool.name: list_session_profiles
tool.description: List reusable session profiles stored for the current root assessment. Values are redacted by default unless include_values is true.

parameter.name: include_values
parameter.description: Whether to include raw header and cookie values in the response. Default: false.

parameter.name: max_items
parameter.description: Maximum number of profiles to return. Default: 50.

tool.name: extract_session_profiles_from_requests
tool.description: Extract reusable session material from captured proxy requests, then save deduplicated session profiles for later authorization and differential testing.

parameter.name: request_ids
parameter.description: Optional list of specific request IDs to inspect. When omitted, request history is queried using the page/filter settings.

parameter.name: httpql_filter
parameter.description: Optional HTTPQL filter for selecting candidate requests from proxy history.

parameter.name: start_page
parameter.description: First proxy-history page to inspect when request_ids is omitted. Default: 1.

parameter.name: end_page
parameter.description: Last proxy-history page to inspect when request_ids is omitted. Default: 1.

parameter.name: page_size
parameter.description: Number of requests per page when reading proxy history. Default: 20.

parameter.name: name_prefix
parameter.description: Prefix for generated profile names. Default: traffic.

parameter.name: include_unauthenticated
parameter.description: Whether requests without auth/session material should still be turned into session profiles. Default: false.

parameter.name: default_role
parameter.description: Optional role label to assign to every extracted session profile.

parameter.name: default_tenant
parameter.description: Optional tenant label to assign to every extracted session profile.

parameter.name: max_profiles
parameter.description: Maximum number of deduplicated profiles to extract in one call. Default: 20.

tool.name: delete_session_profile
tool.description: Delete a stored session profile by profile_id or name.

parameter.name: profile_id
parameter.description: Exact session profile identifier to delete.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: Profile name to delete when the profile_id is not known.
